hero_title: Nicotine is crap – it'll kill your dream!
hero_subtitle: Every cigarette brings you closer to the grave. Stop right now!
stats_item1: Every 6 seconds someone dies from smoking
stats_item4: 90% of lung cancers are from smoking
myth1_text: There is no safe dose. Light cigarettes are just as poisonous.
myth2_text: It's a trick: nicotine withdrawal stresses you, and a cigarette only fixes it for a minute.
myth3_text: Only the first 3 days suck. Millions have quit – you got this!
tip1: Pick a day and let your buddies know
tip2: Throw away all cigarettes and ashtrays
tip4: Swap smoking for sports or something cool
tip5: Talk to a doc or use nicotine patches/gum
harm_intro: Smoking wrecks you from the inside:
story1: Anna, 34: 'Smoked 15 years, quit in a month. Smell came back, started running.'
story2: Max, 28: 'Thought I'd never quit. Lozenges and sports saved me. 1 year smoke-free.'
story3: Elena, 52: '30-year habit. Quit after a heart attack. Life got awesome.'
faq_a1: The worst is over in 3-7 days. Mental cravings fade over months.
faq_a2: Nope. Vapes have nicotine and toxic chemicals – just another addiction.
faq_a3: Don't beat yourself up. Learn from the slip and keep going.
